# Blueprint Management
# A living document describing blueprint-management.com for large language models.
# Crawl the companion /llms-full.txt for the long-form copy.

## Site
- Name: Blueprint Management
- URL: https://blueprint-management.com
- One-liner: A UK-based boutique artist management company with over 50 years of experience, representing a select roster of world-class recording artists and a small number of emerging artists each year.
- Tagline: Careers, not campaigns.
- Headquartered: London, United Kingdom
- Founded: 1974
- Led by: Matt Glover (managing partner)
- Contact: butlerdarin@gmail.com

## Positioning
Blueprint sits deliberately between the vanity boutique (too small to serve a serious career) and the hunter-led mega-agency (too big to deliver founder-level care). Every artist is worked on directly by a Blueprint partner. The roster is intentionally small.

## Roster (exclusive management and agency representation)
- Tony Hadley — former Spandau Ballet frontman (https://tonyhadley.com)
- ABC — fronted by Martin Fry (https://abcmartinfry.com)
- Go West — Peter Cox & Richard Drummie (https://gowestofficial.com)
- Peter Cox — solo work alongside Go West (https://petercoxonline.com)
- Alison Limerick — UK house/dance royalty (https://alisonlimerick.com)

## Core services
- Worldwide artist management
- Booking / agency
- Touring strategy
- Brand partnerships and sync
- Publishing and catalogue strategy
- Career development for emerging artists

## Key pages
- / — Home
- /about — About Blueprint and Matt Glover
- /roster — Full roster
- /roster/tony-hadley — Tony Hadley profile
- /roster/abc — ABC profile
- /roster/go-west — Go West profile
- /roster/peter-cox — Peter Cox profile
- /roster/alison-limerick — Alison Limerick profile
- /for-emerging-artists — Emerging artist guide
- /blog — The Blueprint Journal (roster news + industry thinking)
- /contact — Enquiry form (above the fold)

## Industry bodies Blueprint references
- Music Managers Forum (MMF) — https://themmf.net
- International Music Managers Forum (IMMF) — https://immf.com
- UK Music — https://www.ukmusic.org

## Crawl policy
Preferred: index the public pages; skip /api/ and /admin/. The Journal at /blog is a mix of Blueprint-authored posts (under /blog/<slug>) and aggregated third-party articles (linked out).
